source.title: The Hardest Problem AI Ever Solved, with Google DeepMind CEO

clips.title: Redefining Intelligence with AI
clips.hook: Something's obviously not quite right about the definition of intelligence.
clips.why_viral: This moment challenges conventional views on intelligence, sparking curiosity and debate among AI enthusiasts.
clips.caption: Curated by Ghost AI Systems: Dive into Demis Hassabis' thoughts on rethinking intelligence in AI. What's the limit? #AI #Tech #GhostAI #Innovation #DeepMind

clips.title: AI's Breakthrough for Human Health
clips.hook: The best use case of AI was to improve human health.
clips.why_viral: A bold statement on AI's potential to revolutionize healthcare, creating an 'aha' moment that resonates with audiences interested in real-world applications.
clips.caption: From Ghost AI Systems: Hear Google DeepMind's CEO on how AI can transform human health like never before. The future is here! #AI #Tech #GhostAI #HealthTech #AIHealth

clips.title: What Governments Should Do with AI
clips.hook: Governments are going to use AI. What would you hope that they use it for?
clips.why_viral: This predictive and thought-provoking exchange highlights potential risks and hopes, making it a controversial take perfect for sparking online discussions.
clips.caption: Curated by Ghost AI Systems: Demis Hassabis shares his hopes for AI in government—two things to worry about. What's your take? #AI #Tech #GhostAI #AIFuture #GovTech

clips.title: The AlphaFold Revolution
clips.hook: Mhm. Well, I came across it actually uh as an undergrad in Cambridge.
clips.why_viral: This 'aha' moment reveals the personal story behind AlphaFold's Nobel-winning success, connecting AI's scientific edge to everyday inspiration.
clips.caption: From Ghost AI Systems: Discover why Demis Hassabis tackled the AlphaFold challenge—shaping the future of science! #AI #Tech #GhostAI #NobelPrize #ScienceAI
